title: SWD KFC Mini Cricket Festival this Saturday
description: CRICKET NEWS - More that 800 players are...
bodyText:
CRICKET NEWS - More that 800 players are expected at the annual SWD KFC Mini Cricket Festival that will be hosted by SWD Cricket on Saturday 1 November.


> More than 120 coaches are involved in the annual event, which covers the entire region (Hessequa, Kannaland, Central Karoo, Bitou, Knysna, George and Oudtshoorn).


It will be held at Oudtshoorn High School in Voortrekker Road.

Registration will start at 08:30 and the matches will begin at 10:00.

Enquiries: Merlin Masimela on 044 272 6604.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
